records.m_Talk_FRA: As you all know, nothing stays in place in the imaginary space.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Once we leave, everything we've prepared up until now goes down the drain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then pick one fast. Unless you're not planning on making it back alive.
